may 26,2006 4th odi trinidad 13:30 gmt
west indies 218 for 4 (lara 69, bravo 61*) beat india 217 for
7 (kaif 63, yuvraj 50) by six wickets
first lord in this case will be west indies because it won
the toss and the seventh lord will be the second team, which
was india.

first lord is strong because the it wirth 2nd and 11 th lord
